subject: Re: Fwd: FBO offer

Subject: Re: FBO offer

Dear Eric,
 
I have faxed to your office a copy of the attached purchase agreement signed by the Purchaser.  If all is in order, please have all three Sellers sign the agreement and fax a copy to me at 212 750 0381.  Please also e-mail to me wire transfer instructions for the deposit.  Please call me at 862 485 6315 to confirm receipt of the document.  
 
Also, call me if you have any questions at all.  I look forward to working with you.  Thanks.
 
Sincerely,
